---
title: "EcoForge R package"
---

An R package with a set of tools for simulating ecological environments and generate species' counts or presence/absence data for ecological analyses.

## Instalation

```r
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("ptarroso/ecoforge")
```

## Available vignettes

- [Ferrer-Ferrando et al. Ecography](vignettes/Ferrer-Ferrando_etal_Ecography/Simulation.vignette.html)
- [Package Example](vignettes/Package_Example/QUARTO_ECOFORGE_HTML_PDF.html)
